examples: Aneurism is as good a word as any other.
The taxi driver had a brain aneurism. He was dying.
But then when I saw the price tag, I just about had an aneurism.
Guidant said it would provide an update next week on the future of its abdominal aortic aneurism business.
The jurors became so concerned about her health, she seemed about to have an aneurism, that they stopped listening to her.
